rulings.Case Title: ONE RINCON HILL ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA VS. MOHSIN AHMMED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Mohsin Ahmmed'S Motion For Protective Order And Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant One Rincon Hill Association And Its Attorney Of Record
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 4, 2016, Line 3. Defendant Mohsin Ahmmed's Motion For Protective Order And Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant One Rincon Hill Association And Its Attorney Of Record. continued to May 10, 2016. Parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers and any opposition to department 501 no later than 4:00pm May 4, 2016. =(501/REQ)
